name: github_get_org_copilot_content_exclusion
description: Get Copilot content exclusion rules for an organization (GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/content_exclusion). Public preview. Returns a map of repository names to path exclusion arrays. See [Get Copilot content exclusion rules for an organization](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot/copilot-content-exclu
